app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.62 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for better playback ordering, steadier seeking, and cleaner embedded playback.
releaseNotes: The first server choices are now ordered around the most reliable direct playback paths
The selector avoids duplicate-looking file labels and keeps lower priority fallbacks later
Wrong-title responses and video placeholder links are filtered before they reach the player
Seeking on TV no longer switches servers just because playback is buffering after a seek
Embedded playback has a darker full-surface load state and safer popup handling
HLS and direct-file headers were tightened for more consistent playback
Public update text no longer exposes internal provider details

items.title: The Cube 2.0.62
items.message: Playback ordering, seeking, and embedded playback were improved.

items.title: Development Update
items.message: Hi everyone! 👋 Development officially started on July 10, and work is now actively in progress. It’s going to be a big week as we focus on smoother playback, better streaming performance, improved stability, and fixing the issues you’ve reported. Downloads are also being improved while the main playback work continues. Thank you for your patience, support, and for sticking with THE CUBE. More updates are on the way. ❤️

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
